name_en: New Montaigne 30 Silver Clasp❤️ 'Killing Eve' Bag
name_cn:
New Montaigne 30 Silver Clasp❤️ 'Killing Eve' Bag
A very cool silver clasp that gives me a 'Killing Eve' vibe!
I really like this square bag, it looks so classy when worn, giving a cool and capable feel!
Classic embroidered fabric with genuine leather, professional or casual outfits, both are easy to hold!
The chain is detachable.
Size 24*17*8
